comment: Reference adapter for Claude Code on macOS. Identical to claude-code.example.json except scheduled-maint: macOS schedules via launchd LaunchAgents (cli.py setup install-memory-launchd), not crontab. The ~/.claude layout (skills/, settings.json) is the same as on Linux, so the other verify commands are unchanged. Copy to ~/.config/nervepack/adapter.json (per-machine; not committed).
